title: Resource Allocation Planner
scenario: Create a plan for allocating 5 team members to 10 tasks. Each team member has a specific skill set (developer, designer, project manager, tester). Each task requires a specific combination of skills. The plan should list each team member and the tasks they are assigned to, along with their respective skill sets.
constraints: Must include the team member's name and skill set for each task
Each task should only be assigned to one team member

evaluationCriteria.description: The plan correctly assigns team members to tasks based on their skill sets.
Each task is assigned to a team member with the correct skill set.
Each team member is only assigned to tasks that are within their skill set.
